apis.name: @ohos.notification (notificationManager)
apis.purpose: 通知管理模块，提供发布、取消、渠道管理等功能

apis.name: notificationManager.publish()
apis.purpose: 发布通知，支持 Promise 和 Callback 两种形式

apis.name: notificationManager.requestPermission()
apis.purpose: 该 API 不存在，应使用 notificationManager.requestEnableNotification() 替代

apis.name: notificationManager.cancel()
apis.purpose: 根据通知ID和标签取消已发布的通知

apis.name: notificationManager.cancelAll()
apis.purpose: 取消当前应用所有已发布的通知

apis.name: NotificationRequest
apis.purpose: 描述通知请求，包含内容、ID、wantAgent、角标等配置

apis.name: NotificationContent
apis.purpose: 通知内容容器，通过 ContentType 区分多种内容类型

apis.name: NotificationSlot
apis.purpose: 通知渠道定义，控制提醒方式（声音、振动、角标等）

apis.name: notificationManager.addSlot()
apis.purpose: 创建指定类型的通知渠道

apis.name: SlotType
apis.purpose: 通知渠道类型枚举（社交通信、服务提醒、内容资讯等）

apis.name: BundleInfo (notificationEnabled)
apis.purpose: notificationEnabled 位于 NotificationSetting 而非 BundleInfo；通过 getNotificationSetting() 获取

apis.name: wantAgent (notification click)
apis.purpose: NotificationRequest.wantAgent 字段，点击通知时触发指定操作

apis.name: @ohos.wantAgent
apis.purpose: WantAgent 创建/触发模块，使用 getWantAgent() 创建用于通知跳转的 WantAgent

notableFindings: notificationManager.requestPermission() does not exist — use requestEnableNotification(context) for permission dialog or check state via isNotificationEnabled()
notificationEnabled is in NotificationSetting (getNotificationSetting()), not directly on BundleInfo
Import path for notificationManager is '@kit.NotificationKit'; for wantAgent it is '@kit.AbilityKit'
NotificationRequest.wantAgent field takes a WantAgent object created via wantAgent.getWantAgent()
